title:
Experienced Hasselblad and Nikon Specialist with Great Customer Focus | Leeds, UK 
John Penfold | Focused Photograpic
text:
Email
  
  
    
     My e-bay
  
  
    
     07917 116974
  






I’d love to hear from you … whether you’re buying, selling or just want some guidance
You’re always welcome to visit me, either in Leeds or in my usual spot at the main camera fairs (including Photographica, Wolverhampton and Frome)
After starting in the camera business in 1990, I’ve run Focused Photographic since 2004, giving great customer service with a particular speciality in Hasselblad and Nikon
